arts.ttl: 'No doubt' - Harry Maguire explains how he has resurrected his Manchester United career
arts.sum: Harry Maguire was Man United's knight in shining armour against Leicester City, heading in a late winner.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sends clear message over Man United star who Chelsea tried to sign
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim has made it clear that he wants to keep Alejandro Garnacho following recent interest from Chelsea. The Argentina international has established himself as an exciting prospect at Old Trafford since breaking into the Man Utd first-team, but he’s perhaps suffered a bit of a dip in form this season. arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur were both on the lookout for attacking recruits in the January transfer window. Manchester United didn’t make an attacking signing...

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy blasts Manchester United officials over 'unacceptable and unthinkable' error
arts.sum: Man United scored an injury-time winner to knock Leicester City out of the FA Cup but four of their players were offside from Bruno Fernandes' free-kick.

arts.ttl: Amorim Wants to Sell 'Unbelievable' Man Utd Star in Huge Cut-Price Deal
arts.sum: Manchester United are willing to part ways with striker Rasmus Hojlund in a cut-price sale after the season.

arts.ttl: Man Utd consider move for Delap - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United consider move for Liam Delap, Vinicius Jr in talks to extend Real Madrid contract, Manchester City want Atalanta midfielder Ederson, plus more.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy fumes over 'unthinkable' decision in Leicester City's loss to Man United
arts.sum: “When you prepare the whole week for this game and are reacting after the Everton loss and put in a performance like that and it’s been decided on a clear and obvious mistake, that is unacceptable and unthinkable at this level. The City manager will at least walk away with the positive of having seen his team improve their performance from the 4-0 loss at Everton.

arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho played a key role in helping Man United beat Leicester City 2-1 in the FA Cup fourth round at Old Trafford.
